result: The R script executed successfully. It loaded 4 input files from data/input/, merged them by NSID, derived 4 educational qualification variables (educ25, educ32, educadtl32, educvdtl32), and wrote the cleaned output to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 9408 rows and 5 columns: NSID, educ25, educ32, educadtl32, educvdtl32
